query: Gran Fondo Milano-Sanremo gran fondo cycling Milan to Sanremo

videos.title: Can We Ride The World's Longest Pro Bike Race Route? | GCN Vs Milan–San Remo
videos.description:
Milan-San Remo is the world's longest bike race, a true epic at just under 300km! What happens if you try and ride it? With the help of our friends at Vitus Bikes, Ollie Bridgewood joins Alan Marangoni, a man who raced it five times in his career, to see just how hard it is to make it to Sanremo!

In association with Vitus Bikes 👉 https://gcn.eu/Vitus
Want to take on the route? Check it out here 👉 https://gcn.eu/MilanSanRemoKomoot

Subscribe to GCN+ 👉 https://gcn.eu/liveracing
____________________
🚴 With the 2022 road season promising to be one of the most exciting in recent memory, subscribe to GCN+ for live racing all year round, exclusive shows & cycling adventure films: https://gcn.eu/plus
Download the GCN App 📲  for FREE & be part of the world's largest cycling community: https://gcn.eu/app
Join thousands of other cycling fans in receiving our free weekly ✉️ newsletter roundup, including news, competitions and discounts: https://gcn.eu/3K7

Join us from 16-19 June 2022 in the stunning resort of Saalbach in the heart of the Austrian Alps for Global Bike Festival - the ultimate weekend of bikes, riding, music, entertainment and much, much more brought to you by GCN, GMBN and EMBN: https://gcn.eu/global-bike-festival

Visit the GCN Shop - Shop Now: https://gcn.eu/6-Z
Subscribe to GCN: http://gcn.eu/SubscribeToGCN
Register your interest in the GCN Club: https://www.gcnclub.com/
#Cycling #GCN #RoadBike 

If you enjoyed this video, make sure to give it a thumbs up and share it with your friends. 👍

Watch more on GCN...
📹  Conquering The World's Hardest Sportive! 👉 https://gcn.eu/OllieTDS

Photos: © Velo Collection (TDW) / Getty Images & © Bettiniphoto / http://www.bettiniphoto.net/

The Global Cycling Network (GCN) is the largest and fastest-growing online cycling channel in the world, bringing together a global community of road cyclists to celebrate everything that’s great about the world of cycling. 

Our videos bring fans compelling daily content including expert tutorials, techniques, training, racing, cutting-edge bike tech, unparalleled behind the scenes event coverage, humour,  entertainment, and more. 

Presented by ex-pro riders, GCN offers a uniquely qualified insight into the world of cycling, and most importantly it’s fuelled by our passionate and enthusiastic fans – everyone who makes up the GCN community. We also bring you the latest and greatest tech to your attention, showcase the best places in the world to ride and get exclusive access to events and races. 

Welcome to the Global Cycling Network | Inside #cycling

videos.title: Grand Fondo Milano San Remo - relive.cc
GranFondo Sanremo Sanremo 2024
videos.description:
Granfondo Sanremo-Sanremo La Classicissima al via 17 Marzo 2024 quasi 400 ciclisti, il 16 e 17 è stato  un weekend di grande ciclismo a Sanremo: sabato per i grandi campioni del pedale, domenica in tanti si sono cimentati sulle strade della Riviera e sulle mitiche salite della Cipressa e del Poggio di Sanremo! La Granfondo Sanremo-Sanremo “La Classicissima” è l’opportunità per i veri appassionati del grande ciclismo di vivere l’atmosfera elettrizzante della grande classica Milano-Sanremo, potendosi cimentare in prima persona sulle strade calcate dai campioni più grandi, oltre ad apprezzare l’ospitalità di Sanremo e del suo territorio.
L’organizzazione è curata dall’Unione Ciclistica Sanremo, che dal 1969 organizza manifestazioni ciclistiche amatoriali di successo.  Il percorso  della Granfondo Sanremo di  120 km
VILLA ORMOND, Corso Cavallotti 113, San Remo

Imperia

Dolcedo

Pantasina

Vasia

Imperia

Bellissimi

Civezza

San Lorenzo al mare

Cipressa

Santo Stefano al mare

Pompeiana

Castellaro

Taggia

Arma di Taggia

Poggio di Sanremo (Arrivo)

videos.title: Milan San Remo 2023
videos.description:
315 km (309 si on ne se trompe pas de route) et 2000 m de D+.
Le colle del Giovo - Le capo Mele - Le capo Cervo - Le capo Berta - La Cipressa - Le Poggio.
Filmé avec la GoPro Hero 9 black.
Montage avec Garmin Virb Edit.
